name: AICodeReview
description: Reviews pull request diffs with OpenAI and posts inline comments as PR threads.
helpMarkDown: Requires `Allow scripts to access the OAuth token` to be enabled in pipeline settings.
author: hazardemircan

inputs.name: failOnSeverity
inputs.label: Fail pipeline on severity
inputs.helpMarkDown: Exit with code 1 if any finding at this severity or higher is found. Overrides the value in .codereview.yml.

inputs.name: configPath
inputs.label: Config file path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Path to the rules config file, relative to the repository root.
